items.title: A Multi-Component Model of Emotion Response Convergence: Implications for the Development of Psychopathology
items.author: Kalina J. Michalska, Dana E. Díaz8790Department of Psychology, University of California Riverside, Riverside, California, USA
items.content: <article>Emotion Review, Ahead of Print. A central tenet in emotion research is that emotional reactivity involves convergent changes across subjective, behavioral, autonomic, and more recently neural, response systems. This has led to a model where convergence across multiple response systems ...</article>
